disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly worsening weakness in the hips, thighs and shoulders over about three days, now unable to rise from a chair or climb stairs
trigger_question_examples: What is stopping you getting out of the chair?
When did the weakness start and how quickly has it changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Over the last three days my legs and arms have gone really weak, and tonight I just can't push myself up out of the chair or manage the stairs at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe pounding, pressure-like headache this evening with a home blood-pressure reading of 190/110
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the headache - how bad is it and did it come on suddenly?
Have you been able to check your blood pressure at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My head feels like it's going to explode with pressure, and when we checked on the home machine it said 190 over 110 earlier this evening.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Gradual central weight gain, a rounder and puffier face, easy bruising, thin fragile skin and broad purple abdominal stretch marks developing over recent months
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in your body, weight or skin over the last few months?
Do you bruise more easily than you used to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Over the last few months my face has got rounder and puffier, I've put weight on around my middle while my arms and legs look thin, I bruise really easily and I've got broad purple stretch marks across my tummy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New agitation and mood swings, out of character, over the last two days
trigger_question_examples: Has your mood or behaviour changed recently?
Have the family noticed you seeming different in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The last couple of days I've been really agitated and moody and just not myself, which isn't like me at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medicines, and specifically denies any steroid or cortisone use - tablets, creams, inhalers or injections
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any regular medicines?
Have you used any steroids or cortisone - tablets, creams, inhalers or injections?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on any regular medicines at all, and I haven't taken any steroids or cortisone in any form.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fall risk - unsteady and needs to be steadied by others, with loose rugs on the floor in the living area
trigger_question_examples: Are you safe to move around at home tonight?
Is there anything around the house that could trip you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't stand without two people steadying me, and there are loose rugs on the living-room floor that I could easily trip on.
